text.title: Graph-Indexed vs Diff-Only AI Reviewers Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Repo adopts CodeRabbit because 'everyone uses it'; coverage gaps unknown.
antipattern.fix: Run both on eval set; record decision and trade-offs in ADR.

antipattern.symptom: Two years later, no one remembers why this tool was picked; new lead wants to swap on a whim.
Both tools 'pass' the eval but miss real-world bugs after adoption.
antipattern.fix: Curate ≥ 5 PRs across risk levels with known bug labels.
